_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Comply with organization systems administration standard operating procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Monitor organizational compliance with data protection obligations, conduct internal audits of processing activities, maintain the register of processing activities, and report compliance posture to senior management and supervisory authorities as required.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.579), OP-T-002 (OP, cosine: 0.551).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.482). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [administration, comply, operating, organization, procedures, standard] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, audits, authorities, compliance, conduct, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.864, R=0.839). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 31 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Comply with organization systems administration standard operating procedures." and "Monitor organizational compliance with data protection obligations, conduct inte" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.591 > STS 0.482 (gap +0.110). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [administration, comply, operating, organization, procedures, standard]. WIDAI terms: [activities, audits, authorities, compliance, conduct, data].

signals.detail: STS 0.482 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
